functions.name: maxInt
functions.description: Returns the maximum value among the given Int arguments.

functions.name: minInt
functions.description: Returns the minimum value among the given Int arguments.

functions.name: max
functions.description: Returns the maximum value among the given Float arguments. Use maxSmart instead at compile time.

functions.name: min
functions.description: Returns the minimum value among the given Float arguments. Use minSmart instead at compile time.

functions.name: lessThan
functions.description: Returns true if a is less than b within a margin of error (default 0.0000001).

functions.name: lessThanEqual
functions.description: Returns true if a is less than or equal to b within a margin of error.

functions.name: greaterThan
functions.description: Returns true if a is greater than b within a margin of error.

functions.name: greaterThanEqual
functions.description: Returns true if a is greater than or equal to b within a margin of error.

functions.name: equal
functions.description: Returns true if a is approximately equal to b within a margin of error.

functions.name: notEqual
functions.description: Returns true if a is not approximately equal to b within a margin of error.

functions.name: smoothStep
functions.description: Returns a smooth Hermite interpolation between 0 and 1.

functions.name: inverseLerp
functions.description: Returns the inverse lerp of v between a and b.

functions.name: fract
functions.description: Returns the fractional part of v.

functions.name: maxSmart
functions.description: Compile-time macro shortcut to Math.max with infinite arguments. Does not work in hscript.

functions.name: minSmart
functions.description: Compile-time macro shortcut to Math.min with infinite arguments. Does not work in hscript.
